items.raw_excerpt: Jewish Australian professor Steven Prawer says he paid a private investigator to try to find out whether people who occupied his University of Melbourne office were students on his campus.
items.summary_en: A Jewish Australian professor at the University of Melbourne hired a private investigator. He wanted to find out if people who occupied his office were students at his campus. This happened after a protest at the university.
items.summary_ko: 멜버른 대학교의 유대계 호주 교수 스티븐 프로워는 사립탐정을 고용했습니다. 자신의 사무실을 점거한 사람들이 캠퍼스 학생인지 확인하기 위해서였습니다. 이는 대학 시위 이후 발생한 일입니다.
items.title_en: Professor Hired Private Investigator After Campus Protest
items.title_ko: 시위 후 교수 사립탐정 고용, 위원회에서 진술
items.title_original: Professor hired private investigator after protest, commission hears

items.raw_excerpt: A 20-year-old pedestrian died after he was struck on Middle Road at Greenbank shortly before 9pm.
items.summary_en: A 20-year-old pedestrian died after being struck on Middle Road in Greenbank. The incident happened shortly before 9pm. Police have seized a vehicle but no arrests have been made.
items.summary_ko: 20세 남성 보행자가 그린뱅크 미들로드에서 차에 치여 숨졌다. 사고는 밤 9시 직전에 발생했으며, 경찰은 차량을 압수했지만 아직 용의자를 체포하지 못했다.
items.title_en: Vehicle seized but no arrests after fatal Greenbank hit-and-run
items.title_ko: 그린뱅크 뺑소니 사고로 20대 보행자 사망, 차량 압수됐지만 체포 없어
items.title_original: Vehicle seized but no arrests after fatal Logan hit-and-run

items.raw_excerpt: Beachside memorial plaques honouring two brothers who died in separate freak accidents will be reinstalled following their family’s battle with a local council south of Perth.
items.summary_en: Memorial plaques honouring two brothers who died in separate accidents near a beach will be reinstalled. The family fought a local council south of Perth to have the plaques returned. The council had reversed its earlier decision to allow the memorials.
items.summary_ko: 별개의 사고로 숨진 두 형제를 기리는 해변 기념 명판이 다시 설치된다. 퍼스 남쪽 지역 지방자치단체에 맞선 가족의 노력 끝에 명판 복원이 결정됐다.
items.title_en: Beach memorial plaques for brothers put back after family campaign
items.title_ko: 가족 노력 끝에 해변 기념 명판 다시 설치
items.title_original: Memorial plaques for brothers to be reinstated as council reverses decision

items.raw_excerpt: Chaos ensued in Mandalahalli village near Bidadi as women farmers in the region went up in arms and wielded brooms at officials who had arrived to conduct the Joint Measurement Committee survey for the proposed Greater Bengaluru Township Project, popularly known as the Bidadi Township Project. Officials had to beat a hasty retreat.
items.summary_en: Women farmers in Mandalahalli village near Bidadi chased government officials with brooms during a land survey for the proposed Greater Bengaluru Township Project. The officials were forced to retreat as the protest escalated. No injuries were reported.
items.summary_ko: 벵갈루루 인근 만달라할리 마을에서 대벵갈루루 타운십 프로젝트를 위한 토지 조사가 진행되던 중, 여성 농민들이 빗자루를 휘둘러 공무원들을 쫓아냈다. 공무원들은 급히 철수해야 했다.
items.title_en: Women farmers chase officials with brooms over land survey in Mandalahalli village
items.title_ko: 비다디 타운십 조사 현장, 여성 농민들이 빗자루로 공무원 추격
items.title_original: Survey for Bidadi Township ends in chaos as women farmers chase officials with brooms

items.raw_excerpt: M.V. Rajesh has assumed charge as the Director of the Institute of Human Resources Development (IHRD), functioning under the Higher Education Department.
items.summary_en: M.V. Rajesh has become the new Director of the Institute of Human Resources Development (IHRD) in Kerala, India. The IHRD operates under the Higher Education Department of the state government.
items.summary_ko: M.V. 라제시가 인도 케랄라주 고등교육부 산하 인력개발연구소(IHRD) 소장에 취임했습니다. IHRD는 케랄라주의 고등교육을 담당하는 주정부 기관입니다.
items.title_en: M.V. Rajesh takes charge as IHRD Director in Kerala
items.title_ko: 케랄라주 IHRD 소장에 M.V. 라제시 취임
items.title_original: M.V. Rajesh assumes charge as IHRD Director

items.raw_excerpt: After asking about re-employment, the man was offered a six-month role at lower pay and given a non-negotiable one-week deadline to decide.
items.summary_en: A man was made to retire without any notice or payment. When he asked about re-employment, he was offered a lower-paying six-month role with only one week to decide. The employment tribunal awarded him S$26,350 in claims against his employer.
items.summary_ko: 한 남성이 아무런 통보도 없이 퇴직을 강요당하고 급여도 받지 못했습니다. 재고용을 문의하자 1주일 내 결정해야 하는 조건으로 더 낮은 급여의 6개월 임시직을 제안받았습니다. 고용심판은 고용주에게 26,350달러의 배상금을 지급하라고 명령했습니다.
items.title_en: Man wins $26,350 after being forced to retire without notice or payment
items.title_ko: 통보 없이 강제 퇴직당한 남성, 고용주에 26,350달러 배상 판결
items.title_original: Man made to retire without notice or payment wins S$26,350 in claims against employer

items.raw_excerpt: Weeks after a bumper harvest flooded the market with cheap durians, sellers say the oversupply has begun to ease as Johor's durian season winds down.
items.summary_en: After weeks of cheap durians from a bumper harvest, prices in Singapore are climbing back up. Sellers say the oversupply from Johor is easing as the season winds down. Prices are expected to keep rising as supplies shrink.
items.summary_ko: 풍년으로 두리안이 넘쳐나며 수_week간 저렴했던 싱가포르의 두리안 가격이 다시 오르고 있다. 조호르바루의 두리안 시즌이 끝나가면서 공급 과잉이 해소되기 시작했다는 것이 판매자들의 설명이다. 공급이 줄어들면서 가격은 계속 상승할 전망이다.
items.title_en: Singapore durian sellers say prices are rising again
items.title_ko: 싱가포르 두리안 판매자들, 가격 다시 상승 중
items.title_original: 'Durians don't wait for you': Sellers in Singapore say prices have started to rise again

items.raw_excerpt: Comme chaque année, la place Bellecour accueillera la cérémonie militaire du 14-Juillet à Lyon ce mardi. Plus de 300 participants défileront devant le public, tandis qu’un village consacré à la défense et à la sécurité sera installé tout au long de la matinée.
items.summary_en: Lyon will host its annual Bastille Day military ceremony at Place Bellecour this Tuesday. Over 300 participants will march in front of the public. A dedicated defense and security village will be set up throughout the morning.
items.summary_ko: 리옹에서는 이번 화요일 벨르쿠르 광장에서 7월 14일 국경일을 기념하는 군사 퍼레이드가 열립니다. 300명 이상의 참가자들이 퍼레이드에 참여하며, 오전 내내 국방과 보안을 주제로 한 마을이 운영됩니다.
items.title_en: Bastille Day Parade and Defense Village Celebrate July 14th in Lyon
items.title_ko: 리옹 벨르쿠르 광장에서 열리는 7월 14일 국경일 군사 퍼레이드 및 국방 마을
items.title_original: Défilé militaire, Rafale et village défense : Lyon célèbre le 14-Juillet place Bellecour - Lyon Mag

items.raw_excerpt: Outgoing Ericsson chief slams Europe as a 'shitty neighbourhood' for business – and five-year-old girl seriously injured in 'violent incident' in Helsingborg. Here's the latest news.
items.summary_en: A five-year-old girl was seriously injured in a violent incident in the southern Swedish city of Helsingborg. Police are investigating the case. The incident is one of several stories making headlines in Sweden on Tuesday.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴 남부 도시 헬싱보리에서 발생한 폭력 사건으로 5세 소녀가 크게 다쳤다. 경찰이 사건을 조사 중이다. 이번 사건은 화요일 스웨덴 주요 뉴스 중 하나로 보도되었다.
items.title_en: Girl seriously hurt in violent incident in Helsingborg
items.title_ko: 헬싱보리에서 일어난 폭력 사건으로 5세 소녀 크게 다쳐
items.title_original: Today in Sweden: A roundup of the latest news on Tuesday

items.raw_excerpt: Context is very important for this word, especially if someone asks you if you have any of these.
items.summary_en: The Local France shares a daily French word lesson. The word balles has different meanings depending on context. Readers can learn how native speakers use this common expression.
items.summary_ko: 더 로컬 프랑스가 매일 프랑스어 단어를 소개합니다. 발(balles)은 문맥에 따라 다른 뜻을 가집니다. 원어민들이 이 표현을 어떻게 사용하는지 배울 수 있습니다.
items.title_en: French Word of the Day: Balles
items.title_ko: 오늘의 프랑스어 단어: 발(balles)
items.title_original: French Word of the Day: Balles

items.raw_excerpt: Since Copenhagen started hosting its annual International Citizen Days back in 2019, the events have become an important first step for international workers into Danish society, so this year Lund decided to launch its own event.
items.summary_en: The Swedish city of Lund has started hosting its own International Citizen Days event. Inspired by Copenhagen's similar event since 2019, the gathering helps foreign talents settle in and network across southern Sweden.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴 남부 룬드시가 자체적으로 국제 시민의 날 행사를 시작했다. 2019년부터 덴마크 코펜하겐에서 열린 비슷한 행사에서 영감을 받아, 외국 인재들이 정착하고 인맥을 넓힐 수 있도록 돕는 자리다.
items.title_en: Lund launches its own international citizen day for foreign workers
items.title_ko: 룬드시, 외국인 인재 네트워크를 위한 국제 시민의 날 개최
items.title_original: New international day helps foreign talents network in southern Sweden

items.raw_excerpt: Germany marks five years since the Ahr Valley floods, heat and a risk of extreme weather are expected in southern and central regions, Ukraine allies pledge more air defence support and more news on Tuesday, July 14th.
items.summary_en: Germany remembers the deadly Ahr Valley floods five years later. Hot weather and extreme storms are expected in southern and central regions. Ukraine allies pledge more air defense support.
items.summary_ko: 독일이 아르 계곡의 치명적인 홍수 5주기를 맞아 추모하고 있습니다. 남부와 중부 지역에 폭염과 극한 기상이 예상됩니다. 우크라이나 동맹국들은 추가 방공 지원을 약속했습니다.
items.title_en: Germany marks Ahr Valley floods five years on
items.title_ko: 독일, 아르 계곡 홍수 5주기 추모
items.title_original: Today in Germany: A roundup of the latest news on Tuesday

items.raw_excerpt: Consulta el reporte meteorolÃ³gico actualizado para planear tu visita a la sierra oaxaqueÃ±a durante este martes.
items.summary_en: Check the weather forecast before visiting the mountain town of Capulálpam in Oaxaca on Tuesday. The report helps visitors plan their trip to this small pueblo mágico in the sierra region.
items.summary_ko: 오아하카 주 카풀랄파ﾑ 산악 마을을 화요일에 방문하기 전에 날씨 예보를 확인하세요. 이 작은 마을을 방문하는 여행객들을 위한 날씨 정보입니다.
items.title_en: Weather Forecast for Capulálpam Mountain Town on Tuesday
items.title_ko: 화요일 카풀랄파ﾑ 산악 마을 날씨 예보
items.title_original: Clima y pronóstico detallado para el pueblo mágico de Capulálpam, Oaxaca, este martes 14 de julio de 2026 - Escapada H

items.raw_excerpt: Return without question: grief charity pleads with thieves to return thousands of dollars worth of plants stolen from memorial garden in Dubbo.
items.summary_en: Thieves took thousands of dollars worth of plants from a memorial garden in Dubbo. A grief charity is pleading for the return of the trees. They were planted in memory of loved ones.
items.summary_ko: 호주 더보의 한 기념 정원에서 수천 달러 상당의 식물이 도난당했습니다. 사랑하는 사람들을 위해 심어진 나무를 돌려달라고 자선 단체가 호소하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Thieves steal memorial garden trees for loved ones
items.title_ko: 기념 정원의 나무를 훔친 도둑들
items.title_original: Thieves steal memorial garden trees dedicated to loved ones

items.raw_excerpt: KOLKATA: Teacher Raja Dey fears attendance might drop now that government-run schools have stopped serving eggs for lunch in his eastern Indian state, a dietary change that has stirred a political storm.The humble egg, a popular food in West Bengal, was taken off the menu after the state's recently elected Hi
items.summary_en: Teacher Raja Dey fears school attendance will drop after West Bengal stopped serving eggs in government-run lunches. The popular egg was removed from menus after the state's recent election, stirring political controversy.
items.summary_ko: 인도 서벵갈주의 한 교사가 정부 학교 급식에서 계란이 빠진 후 출석률이 떨어질까 걱정하고 있다. 최근 선거 이후 인기 있는 계란이 메뉴에서 삭제되면서 정치적 논란이 커지고 있다.
items.title_en: Egg-free school meals scramble politics in India
items.title_ko: 인도 서벵갈 학교 급식에서 계란 빠지자 정치 논란
items.title_original: Egg-free school meals scramble politics in India

items.raw_excerpt: “Down East Maine is arguably the most American place in America.”
items.summary_en: An opinion piece argues that Down East Maine represents the most authentically American place in the country. The writer says Maine's small-town spirit captures the true essence of the American republic.
items.summary_ko: 메인주 동부 지역이 미국에서 가장 미국적인 곳이라는 주장이 나왔다. 글쓴이는 메인주의 작은 마을 정신이 미국 공화국의 진정한 본질을 담고 있다고 말한다.
items.title_en: Maine's Small-Town Spirit Is the Essence of the American Republic
items.title_ko: 메인주의 작은 마을 정신, 미국 공화국의 본질
items.title_original: Opinion: Maine’s small-town spirit is the essence of the American republic - Bangor Daily News

items.raw_excerpt: Swedish telecoms giant Ericsson reported a 12 percent fall in second quarter net profit to 4.1 billion kronor (370 million euros), affected by a 6 percent decline in sales and rising component costs.
items.summary_en: Swedish telecom company Ericsson reported a 12 percent drop in second quarter net profit. Profit fell to 4.1 billion kronor as sales declined 6 percent and component costs rose. The results reflect ongoing pressures in the global telecom equipment market.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴 통신기업 에릭슨은 2분기 순이익이 12% 하락했다고 발표했다. 매출 6% 감소와 부품비 상승으로 순이익은 41억 크로나로 떨어졌다. 전 세계 통신장비 시장의 지속적인 압박을 반영한 실적이다.
items.title_en: Sales Slide Takes Ericsson Net Profits Down 12 Percent
items.title_ko: 에릭슨, 매출 하락으로 2분기 순이익 12% 급락
items.title_original: Sales slide takes Ericsson net profits down 12 percent

items.raw_excerpt: After hailstones the size of tennis balls caused damage in northern Germany, forecasters are warning that more severe thunderstorms, heavy rain and intense heat could affect other parts of the country this week.
items.summary_en: Hailstones the size of tennis balls recently caused damage in northern Germany. Forecasters are warning of more severe thunderstorms, heavy rain, and intense heat for other parts of the country this week.
items.summary_ko: 최근 독일 북부에는 테니스 공 크기의 우박이 떨어져 피해가 발생했습니다. 이번 주에는 다른 지역들에서도 강한 폭우와 폭염, 심한 뇌우가 이어질 것으로 예보되었습니다.
items.title_en: Heat and hail: What to expect from the weather in Germany this week
items.title_ko: 폭염과 우박: 이번 주 독일의 날씨는 어떻게 될까
items.title_original: Heat and hail: What to expect from the weather in Germany this week

items.raw_excerpt: Vienna’s outdoor pools are a summer institution: equal parts relaxation and passive-aggressive towel placement. Whether you’re new or just fed up with losing the best spot, here’s your survival guide.
items.summary_en: Vienna's outdoor pools are a beloved summer tradition for locals. Finding the perfect spot can be tricky due to intense competition. This guide offers practical tips on pool etiquette and sunbed strategies.
items.summary_ko: 비엔나의 야외 수영장은 현지인들이 사랑하는 여름 전통입니다. 완벽한 자리를 차지하기는 치열한 경쟁 때문에 어려울 수 있습니다. 이 가이드는 수영장 매너와 썬베드 전략에 대한 실용적인 팁을 제공합니다.
items.title_en: From Sunbed Wars to Schnitzel: Vienna's Pool Survival Guide
items.title_ko: 썬베드 쟁탈전에서 슈니첼까지: 비엔나 수영장 생존 가이드
items.title_original: From sunbed wars to Schnitzel: Survival rules for Vienna's outdoor pools

items.raw_excerpt: The NRMA is encouraging all states and territories to follow the lead of NSW in removing reduced speed limits for roadworks outside construction hours.
items.summary_en: New South Wales has removed reduced speed limits for roadworks when no workers are on site. The NRMA is encouraging other states to follow this lead. Drivers say the old rules caused unnecessary delays.
items.summary_ko: 뉴사우스웨일즈주가 작업자가 현장에 없을 때 적용되던 도로공사 속도제한을 폐지했습니다. NRMA는 다른 주들도 이 조치를 따라야 한다고 촉구하고 있습니다. 운전자들은 이전 규칙이 불필요한 정체를 유발했다고 환영하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: NSW Scrapes Frustrating Roadwork Speed Limits
items.title_ko: NSW, 작업자 없을 때 도로공사 속도제한 폐지
items.title_original: NSW scrapped this 'frustrating' road rule. Should other jurisdictions follow?
